title: Vaykaaris (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vaykaaris''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Vaykaaris system/Legends|Vaykaaris system]]''', a [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
*The '''[[Vaykaaris Uprising]]''', an incident in the Vaykaaris system

{{Disambig}}
